SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINITIFF REIS HOOD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BARRACUDA, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL CLIP, CEO. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
